subcodes.first_line: O noble Siyyid! Though the supreme remedy was sent aforetime, which was the sweet antidote to every sting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سید بزرگوار هر چند از پیش داروی اعظم ارسال شد که نوش هر نیش بود و دریاق
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
